calendarNotes: Plano ISD opens the 2025–2026 school year on August 12, 2025, and concludes on May 22, 2026 — a student early release day — completing 171 instructional days organized across four grading periods and two semesters. Fall Break runs October 13–17, a full five-day closure combining Student/Teacher Holidays (Oct 13–15) with Staff Development days (Oct 16–17); students return October 20 for the start of the second grading period. A no-school day falls on November 4 (Staff Development), followed by Thanksgiving Break running the full week of November 24–28. Winter Break begins December 22 — with December 19 as the early-release last day of first semester — and students are off through January 5 (a Staff Day), with the second semester starting January 6. Martin Luther King Jr. Day (January 19) is observed as a school holiday. Spring Break runs March 16–20, 2026, with an additional no-school day on March 23 (Staff Development), and Good Friday (April 3) is observed as a Student and Teacher Holiday. The school year concludes May 22, 2026.
